title: T-003 — Drizzle migration: wo_outputs table + output_type enum + RLS
prompt:
# T-003 — Drizzle migration: wo_outputs table + output_type enum + RLS

PRD: 08-PRODUCTION-PRD.md §9.4, §16.4 V-PROD-03/04/24

## Goal
Add Drizzle migration creating output_type_enum ('primary','co_product','by_product') and wo_outputs table per §9.4 with batch_number uniqueness per tenant per year (V-PROD-24), QA status tracking, and RLS.

## Implementation contract
packages/db/schema/production/wo-outputs.ts: pgEnum output_type_enum, table wo_outputs with PK id UUID, transaction_id UUID UNIQUE (R14), tenant_id, wo_id REFERENCES work_orders, output_type enum NOT NULL, item_id REFERENCES items, lp_id REFERENCES license_plates, qty_kg NUMERIC(12,3) CHECK >0, catch_weight_details JSONB, batch_number text NOT NULL, expiry_date DATE NOT NULL, qa_status text DEFAULT 'PENDING', label_printed_at, registered_by/at, ext_jsonb. Add UNIQUE constraint (tenant_id, batch_number, EXTRACT(YEAR FROM registered_at)) implementing V-PROD-24. Indexes idx_outputs_wo, idx_outputs_lp, idx_outputs_batch, idx_outputs_qa_status. RLS by tenant_id.

## Files (scope)
- packages/db/schema/production/wo-outputs.ts [create]
- packages/db/schema/production/enums.ts [modify or create]
- packages/db/schema/production/index.ts [modify]
- packages/db/migrations/NNNN_wo_outputs.sql [create]
- packages/db/__tests__/wo-outputs-schema.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given output_type_enum created, when SELECT enum_range(NULL::output_type_enum) runs, then returns ['primary','co_product','by_product']
2. Given two outputs with same batch_number in same tenant+year, when INSERT runs, then second fails with unique_violation (V-PROD-24)
3. Given qty_kg=0, when INSERT runs, then CHECK constraint rejects

## Test strategy
- RED: schema test asserting enum values and batch_number unique constraint before schema exists
- Run 'pnpm --filter db drizzle:generate && pnpm --filter db test wo-outputs-schema'

## Risk red lines
- Do not change enum values (would break downstream consumers)
- Do not weaken V-PROD-24 batch uniqueness
- Do not allow qty_kg <= 0

pipeline_inputs.description: wo_outputs Drizzle table with output_type enum, batch_number uniqueness per tenant/year, QA status, RLS.
pipeline_inputs.details: Mirror §9.4 SQL: PK id UUID, transaction_id UNIQUE for R14, output_type pgEnum ('primary','co_product','by_product'), qty_kg CHECK >0, batch_number text NOT NULL with UNIQUE (tenant_id, batch_number, year_part_of_registered_at) enforcing V-PROD-24. Indexes: idx_outputs_wo, idx_outputs_lp, idx_outputs_batch, idx_outputs_qa_status (composite tenant_id+qa_status). RLS by tenant_id.
out_of_scope: Do not implement output API endpoints
acceptance_criteria: Given enum applied, when enum_range(NULL::output_type_enum) runs, then ['primary','co_product','by_product'] returned
Given two outputs same tenant+year+batch_number, when INSERT runs, then unique_violation raised (V-PROD-24)
Given qty_kg=0 INSERT, when run, then CHECK rejects
test_strategy: RED: schema test asserting enum + batch year-scoped UNIQUE before schema exists
Run 'pnpm --filter db drizzle:generate && pnpm --filter db test wo-outputs-schema'
risk_red_lines: Do not weaken V-PROD-24 batch uniqueness
